en.extract:
The superciliaried hemispingus (Thlypopsis superciliaris) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae.
It is found in Bolivia, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and degraded former forest.

The '''superciliaried hemispingus''' ('''''Thlypopsis superciliaris''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Tanager|Thraupidae]].

It is found in [[Bolivia]], [[Colombia]], [[Ecuador]], [[Peru]], and [[Venezuela]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical]] or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s and degraded former forest.
